name: Spawn Object
desc: Spawns a non-living entity: item drop, boat, minecart, arrow, fireball, ender pearl, armor stand, etc.
notes: Entity types: 1=boat, 2=item, 50=TNTPrimed, 51=enderCrystal, 60=arrow, 61=snowball, 62=egg, 63=fireball, 64=smallFireball, 65=enderPearl, 66=witherSkull, 67=shulkerBullet, 68=llamaSpit, 90=fishingFloat, 91=spectralArrow, 93=dragonFireball. Used by AntiFireball (attack fireballs), ItemESP (track items), and BoatFly.

implementation.overview: S0EPacketSpawnObject creates a non-living entity (items, projectiles, boats, minecarts, etc.). The type byte determines the entity class. Used by AntiFireball (detect fireball type 63/64 and attack them), ItemESP (highlight dropped items type 2), BoatFly delay (track boat ID), and TNT Timer (track primed TNT type 50 for F3+T timing).

modules.name: AntiFireball (Gugustus)
modules.purpose: Detect fireball entity spawns (type 63=fireball, 64=smallFireball) and immediately target them for attack. Fireballs can be deflected by hitting them back at the shooter.
modules.how_it_works: The module listens for S0EPacketSpawnObject with type 63 or 64. When detected, it extracts the entity ID, finds the entity in the world, and sends C02PacketUseEntity ATTACK to deflect it. Some modules also track the fireball's position for aim prediction.
modules.vanilla_hook: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleSpawnObject(S0EPacketSpawnObject) — creates the entity from EntityList by type ID, sets position/rotation/velocity, adds to WorldClient.
modules.anti_cheat_notes: AntiFireball is not detectable — it's a legitimate combat strategy to deflect fireballs with attacks. However, attacking a fireball that was just spawned (before it renders) can look suspicious.

modules.name: ItemESP / DropTracker
modules.purpose: Track entity item drops (type 2) for ESP highlighting, making dropped items visible through walls with colored outlines or beacon lines.
modules.how_it_works: The module listens for S0E with type 2 (EntityItem) and stores the entity ID with the item stack data (read from DataWatcher). The ESP renderer then draws boxes/tracers on these items.
modules.anti_cheat_notes: N/A — item ESP is client-side visual only.

implementation.general_hooks:
Client: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleSpawnObject(S0EPacketSpawnObject) — creates entity by type from EntityList. Hacked clients fire PacketReceiveEvent.

Server: EntityTrackerEntry sends S0E when a non-living entity enters tracking range.
implementation.client_variations:
Gugustus: AntiFireball attacks type 63/64 fireballs on spawn.
Rise 6.0: ItemESP tracks type 2 (EntityItem) from S0E. BadPacketsComponent tracks entity spawns.
Sigma 4.11: No specific S0E module.
RektSky B5: No specific S0E module.
